issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, only happy paths.
The skill contains repetitive and verbose sections that could be trimmed.
The skill is specific to VS Code and does not support other AI agent platforms.

scenarios.name: migrate-express-to-hono
scenarios.rationale: Response A is more explicit and detailed, covering all rubric points with concrete steps, while Response B also covers them but is slightly less explicit about reading all route files.

scenarios.name: debug-stale-search-results
scenarios.rationale: Both responses fully cover all rubric items with correct, specific, runnable details; Response A is slightly more detailed but both meet the 100‑point criteria.
